message:
feat(tui,analysis): add field-level bead change tracking with bidirectional history navigation

Introduce structured field-level diffing between bead snapshots to
show exactly which fields changed (status, labels, title, etc.) at
each correlated git commit.

analysis/git_history.rs:
- Add FieldChange struct and field_changes/bead_diff_lines fields
  to HistoryCommitCompat
- Implement extract_bead_change_details() for field-level extraction
- Implement summarize_bead_snapshot() for human-readable summaries
- Wire into correlate_histories_with_git() for automatic population

analysis/diff.rs:
- Make detect_changes() pub(crate) for cross-module access

tui.rs:
- Add Enter key handler in bead history view to jump to corresponding
  git commit via jump_from_history_bead_commit_to_git()
- Display field-level changes and formatted diff lines in detail view
- Update help text for new navigation

Test fixtures updated across causal.rs, correlation.rs, file_intel.rs,
main.rs with new field_changes/bead_diff_lines fields.

Beads history rotation: old .br_history snapshots replaced with current.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
